## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Scope check

- [ ] Fits the architectural rules in §4 of the project prompt
- [ ] Does not require new third-party scripts (GDPR)
- [ ] Does not increase First Load JS budget beyond 100KB
